scripts.prepare: node -e "try { require('child_process').execSync('git config core.hooksPath .githooks', { stdio: 'ignore' }); } catch {}"
scripts.predev: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { const pid = execSync('netstat -ano | findstr :3000 | findstr LISTENING', { encoding: 'utf8' }).trim().split(/\s+/).pop(); if (pid) execSync('taskkill /PID ' + pid + ' /F'); } catch {}"
